summarization.a: The chart shows the thickness of TiO2 ALD deposited on PMMA and silicon substrates as a function of the number of cycles, showing cycle dependent GPCs.

a.question: What could be a reason for the different slopes in the growth of TiO2 on PMMA?
a.answer: a	It could be that PMMA as a substrate enables enhanced growth, whereas TiO2 growth on TiO2 does not enable this.

a.question: Why does the enhanced growth on PMMA last longer than on SiO2?
a.answer: a	SiO2 looks more like TiO2 in structure than PMMA does so it is likely that the growth on SiO2 looks more like the growth on TiO2 than on PMMA.

a.question: The slope of thickness per cycle after 250 cycles on PMMA and after 150 cycles on SiO2 are similar, why?
a.answer: a	After these number of cycles the substrate does not have an influence on the growth anymore and just the TiO2 acts as a starting substrate. As this is the same for both cases it is likely that the same GPC is acquired.

a.question: What is the GPC of TiO2 on SiO2 in the first stage?
